stages.objective: Observe ordering of multiple async completion events.
stages.goal: Identify stable interrupt interleave in deterministic trace.
stages.theory_detail: Even asynchronous completions follow deterministic ordering under fixed simulation seed and event rules.

hints.nudge: Compare event ticks and sequence order.
hints.explicit: Capture ordered event chain and verify against required order checks.

stages.objective: Diagnose whether observed interleave still satisfies progress checks.
stages.goal: Pass ordering/frequency checks while maintaining completion.

hints.concept: Correct ordering alone is insufficient without final progress.
hints.explicit: Run full scenario and validate ordering plus completion metrics.

stages.objective: Apply tuning and verify interleave constraints remain valid.
stages.goal: Use allowed tuning to preserve deterministic interleave expectations.

hints.concept: Timing changes can shift spacing but should preserve required ordering rules.
hints.explicit: Apply one latency change and rerun until order/count checks pass.
